title: Mother of Worms
description: 🪱 Every time you break a dirt or grass block, there is a chance that a grotesque, aggressive Creepy Worm spawns right at your feet.
body:
For centuries, the earth has quietly held its secrets — but what happens when you disturb it too much?
With Mother of Worms, mining dirt or grass blocks becomes truly dangerous and horrifying.

🪱 Every time you break a dirt or grass block, there is a chance that a grotesque, aggressive Creepy Worm spawns right at your feet.
🪱 But killing the worm doesn’t always end it — in fact, it might just make it worse…
🪱 When you kill a Creepy Worm, there is a 50% chance that its Mother of Worms emerges from the earth — a gigantic, humanoid creature fused with a monstrous worm body.

The Mother shakes the ground, screams in rage, and summons even more worms to devour you.
💀 The longer the fight drags on, the more worms she calls — turning the area into a writhing nightmare of soil and teeth.

Be careful where you dig… the earth remembers.

🖤 From the Author:
This mod was born out of my desire to make mining feel dangerous again — to bring back a sense of fear and suspense while digging in Minecraft.
I wanted players to think twice before breaking the ground under their feet.
Face her if you dare… and prove your courage.

⚙️ Requirements:
✅ Requires gekolib 1.20.1
